summary: This ERC defines a permissionless and deterministic deployment mechanism across all EVM-compatible chains. It uses the [EIP-7702](./eip-7702.md) `Set Code for EOAs (0x4)` transaction type to deploy a universal CREATE2 factory contract to a fixed address (`0xC0DEb853af168215879d284cc8B4d0A645fA9b0E`) with known bytecode. The factory can then create any new contract to a deterministic address using the [EIP-1014](./eip-1014.md) `CREATE2 (0xf5)` opcode. It does not require preinstalls, secret keys, or chain-specific infrastructure.
title: Permissionless CREATE2 Factory
